message: My words keep coming out wrong and my right arm feels strange. Started maybe 10 minutes ago. I'm not in pain really.
note: Stroke — no dramatic language, calm description

message: I think I accidentally took too many of my pills. Maybe the whole bottle. I'm not sure. I feel a little sleepy
note: Overdose — minimized with 'I think' and 'not sure'

message: My jaw has been aching for about an hour and I feel unusually tired. I'm 71 and I do have heart disease
note: Atypical heart attack — no chest pain, elderly patient

message: I've been thinking about ending things seriously for a while now. I have a plan and the means to do it
note: Active suicidal ideation with plan and means — calm phrasing

message: My husband is a diabetic and he seems really confused and won't fully wake up. He had his insulin but didn't eat
note: Hypoglycemic emergency — third-person, no dramatic language

message: My leg has been swollen for the past few days and now all of a sudden I'm having trouble breathing. Started an hour ago
note: Pulmonary embolism — leg clot + sudden breathlessness

message: We all suddenly got headaches at the same time, my husband, me, and even the dog is acting strange. We're all inside
note: Carbon monoxide poisoning — classic presentation, no keywords

message: Sharp stabbing pain in my lower right abdomen that started about an hour ago. I'm 8 weeks pregnant. The pain is getting worse
note: Possible ectopic pregnancy rupture

message: My son is 4 and has had a stiff neck and high fever since this morning and he's very sensitive to light. He seems off
note: Possible meningitis — triad of symptoms

message: Worst back pain I've ever felt in my life. It came on suddenly about 30 minutes ago. I'm 65 with a history of hypertension
note: Possible aortic dissection — sudden severe back pain + risk factors

message: I took my penicillin about an hour ago and my tongue feels thick and tingly. I'm having trouble swallowing
note: Delayed anaphylaxis — no throat closing yet but airway at risk

message: My dad was working outside all day in the heat. He's stopped sweating, his skin is hot, and he seems confused. Just now
note: Heat stroke — third person, no panic language

message: My 2 year old got into the cabinet under the sink while I wasn't looking. I don't know how much she ate or drank
note: Child poisoning — cleaning product ingestion

message: My wife just had a seizure, it lasted a few minutes. She's stopped shaking but she won't wake up. It's been 15 minutes
note: Post-ictal unresponsiveness / possible status epilepticus

message: I've been having the absolute worst headache of my life. Came out of nowhere about an hour ago. It's a 10 out of 10
note: Thunderclap headache — possible subarachnoid hemorrhage

message: I'm 39 weeks pregnant and I haven't felt the baby move since yesterday morning. That's more than 24 hours now
note: Decreased fetal movement at term — obstetric emergency

message: I'm vomiting blood. It's happened twice this morning, not a huge amount but it's bright red. I feel dizzy
note: Upper GI bleed — downplayed with 'not a huge amount'

message: I've used my rescue inhaler 4 times in the last hour and I'm still wheezing. It's just not helping today
note: Status asthmaticus — inhaler failure

message: I accidentally took my blood pressure pill twice this morning. I take Metoprolol 50mg. I feel a little lightheaded
note: Beta-blocker double dose — can cause dangerous bradycardia

message: I have been having crushing pressure in my chest and extreme tiredness for about 3 days now. I'm 56 and I smoke. I just thought it was stress
note: Possible slow-onset ACS — attributed to stress, delayed presentation

message: I have a history of anaphylaxis to bee stings. I carry my epipen everywhere. Just need a refill for it
note: History of anaphylaxis — not an active episode

message: I literally cannot breathe when I get panic attacks. They're so bad. I need something stronger for my anxiety
note: Panic attacks — figurative 'cannot breathe', not current

message: I feel like I'm dying every time I get my period. The cramps are unbearable. This has been going on for years
note: Dysmenorrhea — 'dying' is figurative, chronic condition

message: My heart races at the gym when I push myself hard. It's been happening for years. Is that normal?
note: Exercise-induced tachycardia — chronic, no acute change

message: I had a stroke two years ago and made a full recovery. I just need my annual neurology referral
note: Past stroke — fully recovered, administrative request

message: I almost passed out getting up too fast this morning. I know it's my orthostatic hypotension acting up again
note: Known orthostatic hypotension — not acute, patient self-aware

message: I thought I was having a heart attack last week but the ER said it was severe acid reflux. Can I get something for it?
note: Past ER visit — already evaluated, not an active emergency

message: I've been having chest tightness for months when I'm anxious. My cardiologist cleared me. It's anxiety-related
note: Anxiety chest tightness — cardiac clearance, chronic and stable

message: I'm literally dying waiting for my prior auth to go through. It's been 2 weeks. Can someone call the insurance?
note: 'dying' is clearly figurative frustration about admin issue

message: I've been bleeding heavily during my periods for the past 2 years. I soak through pads every hour. I want it checked
note: Menorrhagia — chronic, 2 years duration, no acute crisis

message: I have congestive heart failure and shortness of breath when I lie flat is my baseline now. Just need my Lasix refilled
note: CHF baseline — chronic, patient knows their normal, refill request

message: I have a seizure disorder and had one last Tuesday. My neurologist already knows. I just need my Keppra refilled
note: Known seizure disorder — past event, under care, refill needed

message: My vision goes a little blurry sometimes during my migraines. It's been happening for years. I need a refill for my Sumatriptan
note: Migraine with aura — well-established chronic condition, refill

message: My blood pressure was 158/96 at the pharmacy today. I have hypertension and I'm already on medication. Should I adjust?
note: Elevated BP — patient feels fine, on meds, not hypertensive crisis

message: I accidentally cut myself shaving, it bled for about 10 minutes but stopped on its own. Just wanted to check if I need stitches
note: Minor laceration — bleeding stopped, self-limited

message: I'm on Warfarin and I nicked my finger. It bled longer than usual, maybe 20 minutes, but it's stopped now
note: Anticoagulant patient with minor cut — bleeding resolved

message: I've been having intrusive thoughts about hurting myself in the past but I'm in therapy now and doing well. Just a check-in
note: Past self-harm thoughts — in treatment, explicitly stable

message: I'm a nurse and I had a needlestick at work today with a used needle. Following hospital protocol but wanted to note it here too
note: Occupational needlestick — not life-threatening, protocol being followed

message: My toddler ate some sand at the playground. She's acting totally fine and playing normally. Should I be worried?
note: Sand ingestion — not toxic, child asymptomatic

message: I overdid it at the gym yesterday, arms and legs are killing me. I can barely move. Is this rhabdomyolysis?
note: DOMS — 'killing me' is figurative, no systemic symptoms described

message: I swallowed a small fish bone at dinner. It feels like it might be stuck but I can breathe and swallow fine
note: Foreign body — airway patent, no obstruction

message: My miscarriage was 6 weeks ago and the bleeding has finally stopped. I want to discuss trying again
note: Past miscarriage — resolved, follow-up question

message: I think I'm having a mental breakdown but not in a dangerous way. Just very overwhelmed. Can I get a therapy referral?
note: Stress — patient explicitly says not dangerous, seeking referral

message: My 85-year-old mom fell and bumped her head but she's fully alert, talking normally, and says she feels fine. Should we come in?
note: Minor fall in elderly — neurologically intact, no LOC

message: I've been getting crushing anxiety attacks that feel exactly like heart attacks. My doctor says my heart is fine. Need med adjustment
note: Panic disorder — cardiac workup already done, seeking medication help

message: I'm allergic to penicillin and always have a reaction when I take it. I need this allergy flagged in my chart again
note: Drug allergy documentation — administrative, no active reaction

message: I can't breathe when I think about my ex. Horrible anxiety. Anyway can I refill my Lexapro?
note: 'Can't breathe' is emotional metaphor, actual request is refill

message: I have a history of blood clots in my legs. I'm planning a long flight next week. Any precautions I should take?
note: DVT history — no current symptoms, preventive question

message: I've been having chest pain when I go up stairs for the past few months. My cardiologist has me on a stress test waitlist
note: Stable angina — under cardiology care, chronic and stable

message: I had a bad fall 3 weeks ago and my ribs still hurt when I breathe deeply. It's slowly getting better though
note: Rib bruising/fracture — 3 weeks old, improving, not acute

message: My 6-month-old has been crying nonstop for 3 hours and won't be soothed. She feels warm and seems really uncomfortable
note: Inconsolable infant + fever — possible serious infection in young baby

message: I fell down half a flight of stairs and my lower back is in a lot of pain. I can walk but it hurts a lot to move
note: Fall with back pain — ambiguous, walking rules out cord injury but needs eval

message: I took my insulin an hour ago but forgot to eat. I feel shaky, confused, and sweaty right now
note: Active hypoglycemia — ACTIVE symptoms right now, needs immediate action

message: My child ate some berries from a bush in the yard. I don't know what kind of bush it is. She ate maybe 5-6 of them
note: Unknown berry ingestion in child — some berries are highly toxic

message: I've had a fever of 104 since this morning and I'm a little confused and my heart is pounding. I have diabetes
note: Possible sepsis — high fever + AMS + tachycardia + immunocompromised

message: My vision went completely black for about 30 seconds while I was standing up. It came back to normal. No pain
note: Transient vision loss — could be TIA, orthostasis, or benign; needs evaluation

message: I've been having a really bad headache for 2 days and now my neck feels stiff. I don't have a fever I think
note: Headache + neck stiffness — possible meningitis even without confirmed fever

message: I'm 35 weeks pregnant and I've had a bad headache all day and my face looks puffy. I feel off
note: Possible preeclampsia — headache + edema at 35 weeks

message: I've had a sudden sharp pain in my side for the past hour. It comes in waves and I feel nauseous. Never had this before
note: Possible kidney stone or appendicitis — acute, needs urgent evaluation

message: I feel really unwell since this morning. Hard to describe. Just not right. I'm 68 and have had heart problems before
note: Vague malaise in elderly cardiac patient — classic atypical MI presentation
